France has denied visas to about 100 journalists, therapists, and technical workers seeking to attend the 2024 Summer Olympics in Paris amid concerns over espionage, Interior Minister Gerald Darmanin toldLe Journal du Dimanche. Those denied visas on those grounds include Russian and Belarusian citizens, he said. The games, which attract hundreds of thousands of foreigners, will be held from July 26 to August 11. Darmanin said France is also concerned about cyberattacks during the games. Russian and Belarusian teams have been banned from participating in the Summer Olympics as punishment for Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, which Belarus has supported.

title: Russians, Belarusians Among Those Denied Visas To Attend Olympics Amid Spy Fears
description: France has denied visas to some foreigners, including Russians, to attend the Olympic Games amid espionage concerns, the nation's interior minister said in an interview.
keywords: News, Belarus, Russia, Ukraine, Russia Invades Ukraine
